sizing_rule.note: Iterative matrix solving to optimize multi-asset portfolio allocation (X₁...X₅) by testing expected portfolio return (E) values and adjusting based on variance convergence. Start with E at midpoint between highest and lowest AHPRs minus 1; lower E if variance exceeds test value, raise E if variance below test value. Continue until optimal E and position weights converge. Formula solves covariance-weighted allocation constraints.

source_rule_text: Use iterative matrix solving to find the expected portfolio return (E) by testing values and adjusting based on whether calculated variance exceeds the test value.
